ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate, certificate) */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program (e.g., 4 years, 2 years) */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "program_website" TEXT /* URL of the program's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_website" TEXT /* URL of the department's website */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic program the course belongs to */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered (e.g., Fall, Spring) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of course (e.g., lecture, lab, seminar) */,
  "course_credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "course_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students the course can accommodate */,
  "course_prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites required for the course */,
  "course_website" TEXT /* URL of the course's website */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department sponsoring the club */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the club */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the club */,
  "club_type" TEXT /* Type of club (e.g., academic, sports, cultural) */,
  "club_website" TEXT /* URL of the club's website */,
  "club_meeting_days" TEXT /* Days the club meets */,
  "club_meeting_time" TEXT /* Time the club meets */,
  "club_location" TEXT /* Location where the club meets */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clubs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the instructor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students_courses" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the student is enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "course_id", "semester")
)
column_names: ID of the academic program the student is enrolled in
Date of birth of the student
Phone number of the emergency contact
